format: provisional MPC3000 SND v2, mono signed 16-bit little-endian payload

segments.name: zero_guard_start
segments.description: Initial zero plateau for alignment and settle.

segments.name: all_12bit_left_justified_plateaus
segments.description: All signed 12-bit values left-justified into 16-bit PCM, each repeated 16 times. Input code for plateau p is p-2048; sample value is (p-2048)<<4.

segments.name: rounding_probe
segments.description: Short plateaus around selected low-nibble/rounding boundaries.

segments.name: zero_guard_end
segments.description: Trailing zero plateau for end alignment.
